title: Enforce the six-section plan overview contract
summary: Make the six-section plan overview template authoritative across template catalog, registry, renderer, tests, and live output.
scope_items: Align plan overview template, section schema, rendered surface registry, and renderer payload.
Add fail-closed parity validation for rendered surface section IDs.
done_when_items: Plan overview contract mismatches fail validation and the live overview renders the governed six-section shape.
